name: Daily RTK pilot sweep
prompt_notes: Use the attached script output as the candidate list and obey its Review budget for the agent section.
Run gh api rate_limit at the start and near the end of the agent review.
Do not post GitHub comments or mutate rtk-ai/rtk unless Máté explicitly asks.
Stop deep inspection and continue lightweight triage only if core remaining is below 1000.
Enforce hard per-run budgets unless the script gives stricter limits: at most 5 heavy PR inspections, 5 issue triage inspections, 3 gh pr diff calls, and 5 comment/review-comment fetches combined.
For local review, verify pwd and git branch first. The correct repo is rtk-ai/rtk on develop.
